channel.title: Fundamentals on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Fundamentals on Zymacs

item.title: What is a computer
item.description: What is a computer? I found it frustrating and kinda embarassiong when struggled to come up with a definition for a Computer recently. (As a Computer Engineering Graduate). I mentioned to a friend how interesting how an interviewer would ask a question that easy. That it was interesting someone would study in a Computer Science related field, use computers daily at a technical level yet fail to answer the question: What is a computer.
